---
title: 'Can You Imagine'
date: '2011-10-08T01:21:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1592559308465391673'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/can-you-imagine.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'EMIC'
---

<a href="http://www.terri.com/can-you-imagine/">Can You Imagine</a><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Dreams Book Concept by Terri Savelle Foy teaching<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><a href="http://www.terri.com/can-you-imagine/">http://www.terri.com/can-you-imagine/</a><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;"><br /></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Imagine your future<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Make a dreams book<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Assign time daily to review your dreams<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Goals must be set<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Initiate action now<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Never speak against your dreams<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;">Expect it<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;Copperplate Gothic Bold&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;"><br /></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: 'Copperplate Gothic Bold', sans-serif;">This was a&nbsp;truly&nbsp;inspirational message.&nbsp;</span></div>
